query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') AS source_value,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND DATE(paid_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30'
GROUP BY JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source')
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
